packets.name: Canonical Contracts and Scaffold
packets.notes: Canonical package/launcher/path contracts are validated in code and smoke tests, with a minimal curated fixture corpus for packets 01 and 02.

packets.name: Pack and Session Contract Parsing
packets.notes: Validated as pure YAML/config parsing, path resolution, and session directory helpers with nested phases.verification parsing, stronger schema validation, and passing packet-00 regressions.

packets.name: Task Artifact Parsing and Scheduler Core
packets.notes: Validated as pure plan/status/progress/resolution parsing plus deterministic scheduler-core logic, with repaired phase-count validation, corrected plan-artifact error typing, and passing packet-local plus adjacent regression tests.

packets.name: SQLite State Store and Filesystem Projection
packets.notes: Validated with idempotent SQLite initialization, canonical session-path helpers, task projection between ready/workers<slot>/done/blocked, ordered session events, and repaired safeguards against orphan/overwritten plan files and invalid non-active worker-slot projections.

packets.name: Pack Hook Runner and Preflight
packets.notes: Validated with deterministic script permission scanning, structured prerequisite/preflight results, direct short-lived hook execution, repaired pack-root containment for conventional hooks, and explicit typed missing-hook coverage.

packets.name: Worker Slot Lifecycle and Timeout Monitoring
packets.notes: Validated as the isolated long-running worker boundary: slot dispatch, per-slot raw log capture, task-scoped phase/detail progress parsing, canonical .status sidecar collection, typed status-sidecar collection errors, and task-level timeout enforcement without SQLite or orchestrator-loop coupling.

packets.name: Execution Orchestrator Loop
packets.notes: Validated as the first execution-only session loop over already-ready tasks, with repaired isolate_end workspace handoff across success/failure/abort paths, stronger malformed-sidecar coverage, and passing packet-03/04/05 regressions.

packets.name: Crash Recovery and Reconciliation
packets.notes: Validated with persisted per-slot recovery metadata, orphaned worker cleanup, done-vs-incomplete recovery classification, filesystem-to-SQLite reconciliation, restart handling for sessions already marked running or paused, and a repaired TERM/KILL path for reparented orphan worker PIDs after crash recovery.

packets.name: Planning and Resolution Runtime
packets.notes: Validated with intake claiming/recovery, planning-disabled .plan promotion, passthrough/script/agent resolution, canonical resolution.json generation, ready-task registration, execution handoff, and repaired rerun safety that clears stale ready outputs before halting on new conflicts.

packets.name: Verification and Auto-Fix Loop
packets.notes: Validated on 2026-03-10 with interval and FULL_TEST_AFTER-triggered verification, canonical verify-log capture, injectable task/global auto-fix retries, persisted verify/auto-fix session state, and a repaired restart path that preserves task-specific auto-fix context after interrupted retries.

packets.name: CLI, Bootstrap, and Built-In Pack Sync
packets.notes: Validated on 2026-03-10 with a stdlib-first bootstrap module, default config creation, bundled built-in pack sync/reset flows, runtime pack listing, a headless CLI start/resume surface over the validated runtime, and a repaired root-launcher exit-code propagation bug.

packets.name: FastAPI REST and WebSocket Backend
packets.notes: Validated on 2026-03-10 with packet-local serve/bootstrap wiring, FastAPI REST endpoints, WebSocket broadcasting, safe session-root path enforcement for file-manager helpers, and a repaired background-control path so pause/abort now affect live execution; packet-local plus adjacent orchestrator/CLI/state regressions pass.

packets.name: Live Backend Event Streaming Repair
packets.notes: Validated on 2026-03-10 with a runtime event sink from the existing orchestrator into the packet-11 backend controller, thread-safe scheduling onto the FastAPI/WebSocket event loop, live task/log/progress/alert streaming coverage, and adjacent server/orchestrator/worker regressions passing.

packets.name: Embedded React SPA Monitor
packets.notes: UI-only packet: add the embedded React 18 SPA, exact design-token implementation, and client-side use of the repaired packet-11 REST and WebSocket contracts.

packets.name: Built-In Packs, Pack Tooling, and Operator Docs
packets.notes: Future packet doc not created yet.
